Implements a menu layer for launching apps, including rendering, selection, and glance services.

# Purpose
The code defines a C module for managing a launcher menu layer in a user interface, likely for a smartwatch or similar device. It provides functionality to initialize, configure, and manage the display and interaction of a menu layer that allows users to select and launch applications. The module includes functions to handle menu selection, drawing of menu items, and managing the state of the menu layer. It also integrates with a glance service to provide quick previews or animations related to the menu items.

The module includes several key components: initialization and deinitialization functions for setting up and tearing down the menu layer, callback functions for handling user interactions such as selecting a menu item, and functions for managing the visual state of the menu, including animations and content indicators. The code also defines a public API for external use, allowing other parts of the application to interact with the menu layer, such as setting the click configuration onto a window or reloading the menu data. The module uses several external libraries and services, such as `launcher_app_glance_service` and `menu_layer`, to provide its functionality.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `launcher_menu_layer.h`
- `launcher_app_glance_service.h`
- `launcher_menu_layer_private.h`
- `applib/graphics/gtypes.h`
- `applib/ui/app_window_stack.h`
- `applib/ui/content_indicator.h`
- `kernel/pbl_malloc.h`
- `resource/resource_ids.auto.h`
- `services/normal/timeline/timeline_resources.h`
- `system/passert.h`
- `util/attributes.h`
- `util/struct.h`


# Global Variables

---
### prv\_menu\_layer\_selection\_will\_change
- **Type**: ``static void``
- **Description**: Handles the event when the selection in a `MenuLayer` is about to change. It takes a `MenuLayer`, a new `MenuIndex`, an old `MenuIndex`, and a context pointer as parameters.
- **Use**: Used to trigger actions or animations when the menu selection changes, specifically by calling `prv_play_glance_for_row` with the new row index.


# Functions

---
### prv\_launch\_app\_cb<!-- {{#callable:prv_launch_app_cb}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L38>)

Triggers the launch of an application using a specified application installation ID.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``data``: A pointer to the application installation ID (`AppInstallId`) that identifies the application to launch.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Casts the `data` pointer to an `AppInstallId` type to obtain the application installation ID to launch.
    - Calls `app_manager_put_launch_app_event` with a configuration structure to initiate the application launch event.
    - The configuration structure includes the application ID, the reason for the launch (`APP_LAUNCH_USER`), and the button ID (`BUTTON_ID_SELECT`).
- **Output**: No return value; the function initiates an application launch event.

### prv\_launcher\_menu\_layer\_mark\_dirty<!-- {{#callable:prv_launcher_menu_layer_mark_dirty}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L47>)

Marks the menu layer of a `LauncherMenuLayer` as dirty to trigger a redraw.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure that contains the menu layer to mark as dirty.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer` is not NULL.
    - If not NULL, call [`menu_layer_get_layer`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_get_layer>) to get the layer from `launcher_menu_layer->menu_layer`.
    - Call `layer_mark_dirty` on the obtained layer to mark it as dirty.
- **Output**: No return value; the function operates by side effect on the `launcher_menu_layer`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`menu_layer_get_layer`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_get_layer>)


---
### prv\_glance\_changed<!-- {{#callable:prv_glance_changed}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L56>)

Marks the `LauncherMenuLayer` as dirty to trigger a redraw when the glance changes.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``context``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` object that needs to be marked dirty.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Casts the `context` pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` pointer.
    - Calls [`prv_launcher_menu_layer_mark_dirty`](<#prv_launcher_menu_layer_mark_dirty>) with the `launcher_menu_layer` to mark it as dirty.
- **Output**: No return value (void function).
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_launcher_menu_layer_mark_dirty`](<#prv_launcher_menu_layer_mark_dirty>)


---
### prv\_menu\_layer\_select<!-- {{#callable:prv_menu_layer_select}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L64>)

Handles the selection of a menu item in a launcher menu layer and prepares the app for launch after rendering the final frame.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``menu_layer``: Unused parameter, typically a pointer to the `MenuLayer` structure.
    - ``cell_index``: Pointer to a `MenuIndex` structure indicating the selected menu item.
    - ``context``: Pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure, providing context for the operation.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Retrieve the `LauncherMenuLayer` from the `context` parameter.
    - Get the `AppMenuDataSource` from the `launcher_menu_layer`. If it is `NULL`, exit the function.
    - Get the `Window` associated with the `launcher_menu_layer`. If it is `NULL`, exit the function.
    - Disable all clicking on the window to prevent further user interaction.
    - Retrieve the `AppMenuNode` at the selected row index from the `data_source`. Assert that the node is not `NULL`.
    - Store the `install_id` of the node in `launcher_menu_layer->app_to_launch_after_next_render`.
    - Mark the `launcher_menu_layer` as dirty to trigger a render of the last frame of the menu layer.
- **Output**: No direct output; modifies the state of `launcher_menu_layer` to prepare for app launch.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`layer_get_window`](<../../../../applib/ui/layer.c.md#layer_get_window>)
    - [`launcher_menu_layer_get_layer`](<#launcher_menu_layer_get_layer>)
    - [`window_set_click_config_provider`](<../../../../applib/ui/window.c.md#window_set_click_config_provider>)
    - [`prv_launcher_menu_layer_mark_dirty`](<#prv_launcher_menu_layer_mark_dirty>)


---
### prv\_menu\_layer\_get\_num\_rows<!-- {{#callable:prv_menu_layer_get_num_rows}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L94>)

Returns the number of rows in a menu section based on the data source context.
- **Inputs**:
    - `menu_layer`: A pointer to a `MenuLayer` object, marked as unused.
    - `section_index`: A `uint16_t` representing the section index, marked as unused.
    - `context`: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` object, which contains the data source.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Retrieve the `LauncherMenuLayer` from the `context` pointer.
    - Access the `data_source` from the `LauncherMenuLayer`.
    - Check if `data_source` is not NULL.
    - If `data_source` is not NULL, call `app_menu_data_source_get_count` with `data_source` to get the number of rows.
    - If `data_source` is NULL, return 0.
- **Output**: A `uint16_t` representing the number of rows in the menu section.


---
### prv\_menu\_layer\_draw\_row<!-- {{#callable:prv_menu_layer_draw_row}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L101>)

Renders a menu row and optionally schedules an app launch callback after rendering.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``ctx``: A pointer to the `GContext` used for drawing.
    - ``cell_layer``: A pointer to the `Layer` representing the menu cell to draw.
    - ``cell_index``: A pointer to the `MenuIndex` indicating the row to draw.
    - ``context``: A pointer to the `LauncherMenuLayer` context containing menu data and state.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Retrieve the `AppMenuDataSource` from the `LauncherMenuLayer` context.
    - If the `data_source` is null, exit the function.
    - Get the `AppMenuNode` for the current row using `app_menu_data_source_get_node_at_index`.
    - Determine if the cell is highlighted using [`menu_cell_layer_is_highlighted`](<../../../../../../tests/stubs/stubs_menu_cell_layer.h.md#menu_cell_layer_is_highlighted>).
    - Call [`launcher_app_glance_service_draw_glance_for_app_node`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_draw_glance_for_app_node>) to draw the glance for the app node.
    - Check if `app_to_launch_after_next_render` is not `INSTALL_ID_INVALID`.
    - If an app launch is scheduled, reset `app_to_launch_after_next_render` to `INSTALL_ID_INVALID`.
    - Send a callback event to launch the app using `process_manager_send_callback_event_to_process`.
- **Output**: No direct output; performs drawing operations and may schedule an app launch.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`menu_cell_layer_is_highlighted`](<../../../../../../tests/stubs/stubs_menu_cell_layer.h.md#menu_cell_layer_is_highlighted>)
    - [`launcher_app_glance_service_draw_glance_for_app_node`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_draw_glance_for_app_node>)


---
### prv\_menu\_layer\_get\_cell\_height<!-- {{#callable:prv_menu_layer_get_cell_height}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L129>)

Determines the height of a menu cell based on the display shape and selection state.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``menu_layer``: A pointer to the `MenuLayer` object, marked as unused.
    - ``cell_index``: A pointer to the `MenuIndex` object, marked as unused.
    - ``context``: A pointer to additional context, marked as unused.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Checks if the display is rectangular (`PBL_RECT`) and returns `LAUNCHER_MENU_LAYER_CELL_RECT_CELL_HEIGHT` if true.
    - Checks if the display is round (`PBL_ROUND`) and determines if the menu index is selected using [`menu_layer_is_index_selected`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_is_index_selected>).
    - If the index is selected, returns `LAUNCHER_MENU_LAYER_CELL_ROUND_FOCUSED_CELL_HEIGHT`; otherwise, returns `LAUNCHER_MENU_LAYER_CELL_ROUND_UNFOCUSED_CELL_HEIGHT`.
    - If neither display type is defined, triggers a preprocessor error for an unknown display shape type.
- **Output**: Returns an `int16_t` representing the height of the menu cell.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`menu_layer_is_index_selected`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_is_index_selected>)


---
### prv\_play\_glance\_for\_row<!-- {{#callable:prv_play_glance_for_row}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L142>)

Plays a glance animation for a specific row in the launcher menu layer if selection animations are enabled.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure, which contains the menu layer and its associated data.
    - ``row``: An unsigned 16-bit integer representing the index of the row for which to play the glance animation.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer` is NULL or if `selection_animations_enabled` is false; if either is true, return immediately.
    - Retrieve the `AppMenuDataSource` from `launcher_menu_layer`.
    - Get the `AppMenuNode` at the specified `row` index from the data source.
    - Call [`launcher_app_glance_service_play_glance_for_app_node`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_play_glance_for_app_node>) with the `glance_service` and the retrieved `AppMenuNode` to play the glance animation.
- **Output**: No output is returned as the function is of type `void`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`launcher_app_glance_service_play_glance_for_app_node`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_play_glance_for_app_node>)


---
### prv\_launcher\_menu\_layer\_set\_selection\_index<!-- {{#callable:prv_launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_index}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L161>)

Sets the selection index of a `LauncherMenuLayer` and optionally animates the change.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure that represents the menu layer to modify.
    - ``index``: An unsigned 16-bit integer representing the new selection index for the menu.
    - ``row_align``: A `MenuRowAlign` value that specifies how the row should be aligned in the menu view.
    - ``animated``: A boolean value indicating whether the change should be animated.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer` or its `data_source` is NULL; if so, return immediately.
    - Create a [`MenuIndex`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.h.md#MenuIndex>) with section 0 and the given `index`.
    - Call `menu_layer_set_selected_index` to update the selection index of the `menu_layer` within `launcher_menu_layer`, using the new [`MenuIndex`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.h.md#MenuIndex>), `row_align`, and `animated` parameters.
    - Call [`prv_play_glance_for_row`](<#prv_play_glance_for_row>) to play a glance animation for the newly selected row.
- **Output**: No output is returned as the function is of type `void`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`MenuIndex`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.h.md#MenuIndex>)
    - [`prv_play_glance_for_row`](<#prv_play_glance_for_row>)

### launcher\_menu\_layer\_init<!-- {{#callable:launcher_menu_layer_init}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L177>)

Initializes a `LauncherMenuLayer` with a given data source and sets up its visual and functional components.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure to initialize.
    - ``data_source``: A pointer to an `AppMenuDataSource` that provides data for the menu layer.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer` is NULL and return if true.
    - Set the `launcher_menu_layer` to the size of the display using `DISP_FRAME`.
    - Initialize fonts for the title and subtitle using `fonts_get_system_font`.
    - Initialize the `container_layer` with the display frame.
    - Assign the `data_source` to `launcher_menu_layer`.
    - Adjust the `menu_layer_frame` for round displays using insets if `PBL_ROUND` is defined.
    - Initialize the `menu_layer` with the adjusted frame and set highlight colors and callbacks.
    - For round displays, initialize and add `up_arrow_layer` and `down_arrow_layer` for content indicators.
    - Add the `menu_layer` to the `container_layer` after setting up content indicators.
    - Initialize the `glance_service` and set its handlers.
    - Set the initial selection index to the first item without animation.
- **Output**: No return value; the function initializes the `launcher_menu_layer` in place.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`GEdgeInsets`](<../../../../applib/graphics/gtypes.h.md#GEdgeInsets>)
    - [`grect_inset`](<../../../../applib/graphics/gtypes.c.md#grect_inset>)
    - [`menu_layer_set_highlight_colors`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_set_highlight_colors>)
    - [`menu_layer_pad_bottom_enable`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_pad_bottom_enable>)
    - [`GSize`](<../../../../applib/graphics/gtypes.h.md#GSize>)
    - [`scroll_layer_get_content_indicator`](<../../../../applib/ui/scroll_layer.c.md#scroll_layer_get_content_indicator>)
    - [`content_indicator_configure_direction`](<../../../../applib/ui/content_indicator.c.md#content_indicator_configure_direction>)
    - [`menu_layer_get_layer`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_get_layer>)
    - [`launcher_app_glance_service_init`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_init>)
    - [`launcher_app_glance_service_set_handlers`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_set_handlers>)
    - [`prv_launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_index`](<#prv_launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_index>)

### launcher\_menu\_layer\_set\_click\_config\_onto\_window<!-- {{#callable:launcher_menu_layer_set_click_config_onto_window}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L280>)

Associates the click configuration of a `LauncherMenuLayer` with a specified `Window`.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure that contains the menu layer to configure.
    - ``window``: A pointer to a `Window` structure where the click configuration will be set.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer` or `window` is `NULL`; if either is `NULL`, return immediately without performing any action.
    - Call `menu_layer_set_click_config_onto_window` with the `menu_layer` from `launcher_menu_layer` and the specified `window` to set the click configuration.
- **Output**: No output is returned; the function modifies the click configuration of the specified `Window`.

### launcher\_menu\_layer\_set\_selection\_state<!-- {{#callable:launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_state}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L297>)

Sets the selection state of a `LauncherMenuLayer` by updating the selected row index and scroll offset.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` object that represents the menu layer to update.
    - ``new_state``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayerSelectionState` object that contains the new row index and scroll offset to set.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer`, its `data_source`, or `new_state` is `NULL`; if any are `NULL`, return immediately.
    - Set `animated` to `false` to indicate that changes should not be animated.
    - Call [`prv_launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_index`](<#prv_launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_index>) with `launcher_menu_layer`, `new_state->row_index`, `MenuRowAlignNone`, and `animated` to update the selected row index.
    - Create a [`GPoint`](<../../../../applib/graphics/gtypes.h.md#GPoint>) named `new_scroll_offset` with x-coordinate `0` and y-coordinate `new_state->scroll_offset_y`.
    - Call [`scroll_layer_set_content_offset`](<../../../../applib/ui/scroll_layer.c.md#scroll_layer_set_content_offset>) with the scroll layer of `launcher_menu_layer->menu_layer`, `new_scroll_offset`, and `animated` to update the scroll offset.
- **Output**: No output is returned.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_index`](<#prv_launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_index>)
    - [`GPoint`](<../../../../applib/graphics/gtypes.h.md#GPoint>)
    - [`scroll_layer_set_content_offset`](<../../../../applib/ui/scroll_layer.c.md#scroll_layer_set_content_offset>)


---
### launcher\_menu\_layer\_get\_selection\_vertical\_range<!-- {{#callable:launcher_menu_layer_get_selection_vertical_range}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L313>)

Retrieves the vertical range of the current selection in a `LauncherMenuLayer` and stores it in a `GRangeVertical` structure.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure from which to get the selection's vertical range.
    - ``vertical_range_out``: A pointer to a `GRangeVertical` structure where the function will store the vertical range of the selection.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer` or `vertical_range_out` is NULL; if either is NULL, return immediately.
    - Call [`layer_get_global_frame`](<../../../../applib/ui/layer.c.md#layer_get_global_frame>) to get the global frame of the selection's layer and store it in `selection_global_rect`.
    - Assign the `origin.y` and `size.h` of `selection_global_rect` to `origin_y` and `size_h` of `vertical_range_out`, respectively.
- **Output**: The function does not return a value, but it modifies the `GRangeVertical` structure pointed to by `vertical_range_out` to contain the vertical range of the selection.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`layer_get_global_frame`](<../../../../applib/ui/layer.c.md#layer_get_global_frame>)

### launcher\_menu\_layer\_get\_selection\_state<!-- {{#callable:launcher_menu_layer_get_selection_state}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L328>)

Retrieves the current selection state of a `LauncherMenuLayer` and stores it in a provided `LauncherMenuLayerSelectionState` structure.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure from which to retrieve the selection state.
    - ``state_out``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayerSelectionState` structure where the function will store the retrieved selection state.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer`, its `data_source`, or `state_out` is `NULL`; if any are `NULL`, return immediately without doing anything.
    - Retrieve the `menu_layer` and `scroll_layer` from the `launcher_menu_layer`.
    - Get the selected row index from the `menu_layer` using [`menu_layer_get_selected_index`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_get_selected_index>).
    - Get the vertical scroll offset from the `scroll_layer` using [`scroll_layer_get_content_offset`](<../../../../applib/ui/scroll_layer.c.md#scroll_layer_get_content_offset>).
    - Store the retrieved row index and scroll offset in the `state_out` structure.
- **Output**: The function does not return a value, but it populates the `state_out` structure with the current row index and scroll offset of the `LauncherMenuLayer`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`menu_layer_get_selected_index`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_get_selected_index>)
    - [`scroll_layer_get_content_offset`](<../../../../applib/ui/scroll_layer.c.md#scroll_layer_get_content_offset>)

### launcher\_menu\_layer\_set\_selection\_animations\_enabled<!-- {{#callable:launcher_menu_layer_set_selection_animations_enabled}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L344>)

Enables or disables selection animations for a `LauncherMenuLayer` and manages the corresponding glance service actions.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``launcher_menu_layer``: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure that represents the menu layer to modify.
    - ``enabled``: A boolean value indicating whether to enable (`true`) or disable (`false`) selection animations.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer` is `NULL`; if so, return immediately.
    - Set the `selection_animations_enabled` field of `launcher_menu_layer` to the value of `enabled`.
    - If `enabled` is `true`, get the currently selected index from the `menu_layer` and call [`prv_play_glance_for_row`](<#prv_play_glance_for_row>) with the selected row.
    - If `enabled` is `false`, call [`launcher_app_glance_service_rewind_current_glance`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_rewind_current_glance>) to rewind the current glance.
- **Output**: No return value; the function modifies the state of the `LauncherMenuLayer` and its associated glance service.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`menu_layer_get_selected_index`](<../../../../applib/ui/menu_layer.c.md#menu_layer_get_selected_index>)
    - [`prv_play_glance_for_row`](<#prv_play_glance_for_row>)
    - [`launcher_app_glance_service_rewind_current_glance`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_rewind_current_glance>)

### launcher\_menu\_layer\_deinit<!-- {{#callable:launcher_menu_layer_deinit}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/launcher/default/launcher_menu_layer.c#L359>)

Deinitializes a `LauncherMenuLayer` by releasing its resources and associated layers.
- **Inputs**:
    - `launcher_menu_layer`: A pointer to a `LauncherMenuLayer` structure to deinitialize.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `launcher_menu_layer` is NULL; if so, return immediately.
    - Call [`launcher_app_glance_service_deinit`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_deinit>) to deinitialize the `glance_service` within `launcher_menu_layer`.
    - Call `menu_layer_deinit` to deinitialize the `menu_layer` within `launcher_menu_layer`.
    - If `PBL_ROUND` is defined, call [`layer_deinit`](<../../../../applib/ui/layer.c.md#layer_deinit>) for `up_arrow_layer` and `down_arrow_layer` within `launcher_menu_layer`.
    - Call [`layer_deinit`](<../../../../applib/ui/layer.c.md#layer_deinit>) to deinitialize the `container_layer` within `launcher_menu_layer`.
- **Output**: No output is returned.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`launcher_app_glance_service_deinit`](<launcher_app_glance_service.c.md#launcher_app_glance_service_deinit>)
    - [`layer_deinit`](<../../../../applib/ui/layer.c.md#layer_deinit>)
